channel.title: LLM Timeline — Meta AI Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Meta AI.

item.title: Llama 4 Scout + ScaleRL (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 109B License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 4 Scout (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 109B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 4 Maverick (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 4 Behemoth (preview) (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2T License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 4 Behemoth (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 4 Behemoth License: closed Type: model 2T-A288B. Announced Apr/2025, abandoned Jul/2025. "We also trained a teacher model, Llama 4 Behemoth, that outperforms GPT-4.5, Claude Sonnet 3.7, and Gemini 2.0 Pro on STEM-focused benchmarks such as MATH-500 and GPQA Diamond... 288B active parameters, 16 experts, and nearly two trillion total parameters."

item.title: Llama 4 Maverick (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 4 Maverick License: open Type: model 400B-A17B. "Our most powerful open source multimodal model. 17B active params x 128 experts, 400B total params"

item.title: Llama 4 Scout (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 4 Scout License: open Type: model 200 languages, "includes diverse text, image, and video datasets."

item.title: Llama 3.3 70B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: BLT (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: BLT License: open Type: model Byte Latent Transformer (BLT), a new byte-level LLM architecture that, for the first time, matches tokenization-based LLM performance

item.title: Large Concept Model (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Large Concept Model License: open Type: model "autoregressive sentence prediction in an embedding space." 7.7T tokens is a misprint, should be 2.2T as in paper.

item.title: Llama 3.3 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 3.3 License: open Type: model Drop-in replacement for Llama 3.1 70B, comparable performance to Llama 3.1 405B.

item.title: Movie Gen Video (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Movie Gen Audio (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.2 11B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 10.6B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.2 90B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 88.6B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.2 1B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 1.2B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.2 3B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 3.2B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.2 90B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 3.2 90B License: open Type: model Vision (VLM)

item.title: Llama 3.2 3B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 3.2 3B License: open Type: model Text (LLM). "Pre-training. [For Llama 3.2 3B] We prune the models from their 8B siblings and use logits from the 8B and 70B models as token-level targets (token-level distillation). We then use knowledge distillation to recover performance."

item.title: Segment Anything Model 2 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 224.4M License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.1-405B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 405B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.1-70B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.1-8B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3.1 405B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 3.1 405B License: open Type: model Announce: https://ai.meta.com/blog/meta-llama-3-1/ Model card: https://github.com/meta-llama/llama-models/blob/main/models/llama3_1/MODEL_CARD.md

item.title: Chameleon (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Chameleon License: open Type: model Multimodal

item.title: Llama 3-70B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 3 70B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 3 70B License: open Type: model Instruct MMLU-Pro=56.2

item.title: V-JEPA (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 630M License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: MobileLLM (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: MobileLLM License: open Type: model Optimizing Sub-billion Parameter Language Models for On-Device Use Cases

item.title: Code Llama-70B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: CodeLlama-70B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: CodeLlama-70B License: open Type: model Paper link is to 34B from Aug/2023. This 70B model finished training Jan/2024.

item.title: Llama Guard (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: SeamlessM4T-Large v2 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: SeamlessM4T-Large v2 License: open Type: model Based on NLLB and older models. https://github.com/facebookresearch/seamless_communication

item.title: Emu (Meta) (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2.8B License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 2 Long (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 2 Long License: closed Type: model Unreleased to date. Context window=32,768 tokens (compare to Llama 2=4096 tokens)

item.title: Code Llama-34B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 34B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Code Llama-7B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Code Llama-13B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Code Llama 34B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Code Llama 34B License: open Type: model Outperforms GPT-3.5. Initial Llama 2 (2T tokens) trained on 500B tokens of code, 100B tokens of python

item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Llama 2 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 2 License: open Type: model Context window=4096. MMLU=68.9 (GPT-3.5=70.0, GPT-4=86.4)

item.title: MusicGen (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 3.4B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: BlenderBot 3x (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: BlenderBot 3x License: open Type: model OPT-175B with new dialogue data

item.description: Parameters: 1B License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.description: Parameters: 932M License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: LIMA (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: LIMA License: closed Type: model LLaMA-65B with nearly no fine-tuning, no RLHF

item.description: Parameters: 636M License: open Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: LLaMA-65B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: LLaMA-65B License: open Type: model Researchers only, noncommercial only. 'LLaMA-65B is competitive with the best models, Chinchilla70B and PaLM-540B.'

item.title: Toolformer+Atlas 11B+NLLB 54B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Toolformer+Atlas 11B+NLLB 54B License: closed Type: model Based on GPT-J 6.7B + access to other models via API

item.title: Fairseq (Meta AI)

item.description: Parameters: 1T License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: Megatron-11B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Megatron-11B License: open Type: model My favourite model until GPT-3 and GPT-4 came along: https://github.com/facebookresearch/fairseq/blob/main/examples/megatron_11b/README.md

item.title: RoBERTa (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: RoBERTa License: open Type: model calcs: "In total, this batch size and number of steps corresponds to pre-training on 235 ≈ 34B tokens. This is considerably less than BERT (Devlin et al., 2018), which used roughly 137B tokens, or RoBERTa (Liu et al., 2019c), which used roughly 2.2T tokens. Using only 2 35 tokens results in a reasonable computational budget while still providing a sufficient amount of pre-training for acceptable performance. We consider the effect of pre-training for more steps in Sections 3.6 and 3.7. Note that 2 35 tokens only covers a fraction of the entire C4 data set, so we never repeat any data during pre-training." https://arxiv.org/pdf/1910.10683.pdf MMLU shows RoBERTa-base 125M only=27.9 (not 355M)

item.title: ConvS2S (ensemble of 8 models) (Meta AI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI
